zh.Caistor Saint Edmunds, Norfolk, England,: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可凱斯托 聖 艾德蒙茲
zh.Ormsby, Caistor Saint Edmunds, Norfolk,: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可凱斯托 聖 艾德蒙茲
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Clere於1176年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可凱斯托 聖 艾德蒙茲時，他的父親William Clere29歲，母親Julian Mollenes30歲。他於大約1196年與Anabell Ormesby在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1284年在他的家鄉享年108歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Clere于1176年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可凱斯托 聖 艾德蒙茲时，他的父亲William Clere29岁，母亲Julian Mollenes30岁。他于大约1196年与Anabell Ormesby在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1284年在他的家乡享年108岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Clear
meanings: English (southeastern England, of Norman origin): from Clere, the French popular form of the personal name Clare 2, and possibly interchangeable with it or confused with it.

English (southeastern): probably a habitational name from clere, a component of several placenames in north Hampshire (Highclere, Burghclere, Kingsclere). This is probably from a Celtic stream name meaning ‘bright’ (cognate with Latin clarus ‘clear, bright’).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Klar   1.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Clere was born in 1176, in Caistor Saint Edmunds, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Clere, was 29 and his mother, Julian Mollenes, was 30. He married Anabell Ormesby about 1196, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1284, in his hometown, at the age of 108.

Il a épousé Anabell Ormesby environ 1196, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1284, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 108 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Clereが1176年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクケイストル サイント エドムンズで生まれた時，父William Clereは29歳，母Julian Mollenesは30歳であった。約1196年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでAnabell Ormesbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1284年に故郷で108歳で死去した。

ko.Caistor Saint Edmunds, Norfolk, England,: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 케이스터 세인트 에드먼드즈
ko.Ormsby, Caistor Saint Edmunds, Norfolk,: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 케이스터 세인트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Clere(이)가 1176년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 케이스터 세인트 에드먼드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Clere(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Julian Mollenes(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1196년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Anabell Ormesby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1284년 그의 고향에서 108세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Clere nasceu em 1176, em Caistor Saint Edmunds, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Clere, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Julian Mollenes, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Anabell Ormesby aproximadamente 1196, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1284, em sua cidade natal, com 108 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Clere родился в 1176 г. в местности цеистор сеинт эдмундс, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Clere было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Julian Mollenes, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Anabell Ormesby около 1196 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1284 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 108 лет.
